rationale: Patients and healthcare staff need a calm, grounded, and highly readable interface to manage critical data. Warm earthy backgrounds with sky blue accents build trust without feeling like a sterile cold tech app. Flat solid surfaces are used over glassmorphism to ensure data clarity.

layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-sm for hover states, otherwise flat with 1px borders

component_guidelines.sidebar: Flat solid background (#FFFFFF), right border 1px solid (#E7E5E4). Navigation links with primary hover text and slight background tint.
component_guidelines.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E7E5E4). Hover: translate-y-[-2px] with shadow-md. Content must be padded with p-6.
component_guidelines.buttons: Primary actions use bg-[#0EA5E9] hover:bg-[#0284C7] text-white. Secondary actions use outline style with warm border.
component_guidelines.tables: Shadcn Table component. Left-aligned text. Strict grid hierarchy. Use text-sm for data density.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn input/select with 1px border (#E7E5E4), focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0EA5E9].
component_guidelines.badges: For stock status, use rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs. Low stock: bg-red-100 text-red-700. In stock: bg-green-100 text-green-700.
component_guidelines.charts: Recharts/Shadcn charts. Use primary and secondary colors.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight for a high-end medical app feel.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly set text color on hover. Use transition-colors duration-200.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Visible focus ring (2px) using primary color for accessibility.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Use subtle skeleton loaders (pulse) matching the background tint, not generic gray.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA / APCA standards against warm backgrounds.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

forbidden_patterns: No teal green or teal blue (#1B93A4)
No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings
No pure black (#000000) or pure gray
